security_name: AT&T Inc. 4.750% Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series C
notes: Perpetual cumulative preferred stock issued by AT&T Inc. Each depositary share represents a 1/1,000th interest in a share of Series C with a $25,000 stated amount ($25 per depositary share). Callable at $25 per depositary share on or after February 18, 2025. Also callable at $25.50 per depositary share within 90 days after a ratings event. Currently past its call date but has not been redeemed.
